data.title: Sportsman's Warehouse Rallies On Q3 Earnings Surprise: Gross Margins Shine Amid Declining Sales
data.description: Sportsman's Warehouse shares rise premarket as net sales decline 4.8% due to inflationary pressures, but beat expectations.

data.title: Lithium Producers Brace For Prolonged Oversupply, Stalled Prices
data.description: Max 155 characters: Lithium market remains oversupplied, prices low, but could help EV transition. Chinese dominance and US policy shifts also play a role.
